LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO MARCH-17-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BON APPETIT MANAGEMENT COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE CGC-24-612825 WITH CASE CGC-24-614139; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE STIPULATED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED. DELEON V. BON APPETIT MANAGEMENT CO. ET AL., CGC-24-612825, IS CONSOLIDATED WITH STARBUCK COFFEE CO. V. BON APPETIT MANAGEMENT CO., CGC-24-614139, FOR ALL PURPOSES. DELEON, CGC-24-612825, SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-612825 WITH CASE CGC-24-614139
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BON APPETIT MANAGEMENT COMPANY's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE CGC-24-612825 WITH CASE CGC-24-614139.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The stipulated motion to consolidate is granted. DeLeon v. Bon Appetit Management Co. et al., CGC-24-612825, is consolidated with Starbuck Coffee Co. v. Bon Appetit Management Co., CGC-24-614139, for all purposes. DeLeon, CGC-24-612825, shall be the lead case.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
